doc.content:
# Grime Time Site — PRD (stub)
## Vision Public web presence for Grime Time. Flesh out audience, pages, and brand as the project grows.
## Initial scope - Git repo with RepoPlanner submodule and `.planning/` contract (STATE, TASK-REGISTRY, ROADMAP). - Site implementation TBD (framework, hosting).
## Success criteria (phase 01) - Planning loop runnable from repo root (`npm run planning -- snapshot`). - Source pushed to `main` with submodule pinned.
## Out of scope (for now) - Full visual design system and content migration (add in later phases).
